what_was_done: Session 654: Installed global git prepare-commit-msg hook (~/.git-hooks/) to replace co-author trailer in ALL repos. Added repo-local hook chaining so pi-mono husky pre-commit keeps working.

Test nv-embed-v1 quality in real sessions — compare search relevance vs nomic

last_response_preview:
**torus-ai-sdk** (`@torus/sdk`) is **Phase 1 of the Torus AI Platform roadmap** — a thin TypeScript SDK that wraps the Torus AI proxy.

**What it does:** Gives developers a single interface to call 13+ AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Venice, etc.) through the Torus proxy, with TRS (Torus Reward Score) rewards earned on every API call.

**Key characteristics:**
- **Zero runtime dependencies** — uses native `fetch()` only
- **BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)** — provider keys are never stored se
